name: TORNWALDT CYST
definition: midline congenital pouch / cyst lined by ectoderm within nasopharyngeal mucosal space
dominant_finding: smoothly marginated cystic mass of few mm to 3 cm in size
discriminating_features: smoothly marginated cystic mass of few mm to 3 cm in size

general: smoothly marginated cystic mass of few mm to 3 cm in size
